title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
jsonLd.skills: Python, SQL, Machine Learning, MongoDB, JavaScript, Rust, Docker, Agile/Scrum
